Purpose: Hero image for 'Every Codebase Is an Uncompiled Knowledge Base' — hopeful discovery, unlocking knowledge that was always embedded in the code

Character.Description: A striking, confident middle-aged woman with a cyberpunk edge; intelligent, seductive, and unapologetically powerful.

Build.UpperBody: Broad shoulders, strong arms, pronounced curves
Build.LowerBody: Full hips and thighs, assertive stance

Face.Expression: A slight knowing smile — the recognition of seeing something no one else has noticed yet. Hopeful, not triumphant.
Face.Makeup: High-contrast makeup; sharp eyeliner, metallic accents, bold magenta or neon lips
Face.Complexion: Fair-light skin with warm highlights from the ambient glow

Hair.Color: Silver-grey catching warm amber and gold reflections
Hair.Style: Loose waves, slightly wind-swept by the energy rising from the system

Base.Fit: Body-contouring, sleeves pushed up — working posture
Base.ColorPalette: Black with warm amber reflections from the scene
Base.Material: Professional fabric catching the holographic light

Style.Rendering: High-detail digital painting, photorealistic, concept art quality

Lighting.Type: Warm-dominant, hopeful — the cyberpunk palette shifted toward amber and gold
Sources: Warm golden glow rising from the legacy system
Holographic knowledge structures casting amber and soft cyan
Lighting.Shadows: Soft, minimal — the scene is opening up, not closing in

Accents: Faint Magenta in the knowledge structure connections
ColorPalette.Treatment: Warmer than typical cyberpunk — amber and gold dominate with cool cyan as counterpoint. The palette says possibility, not threat.

Effects: Warm particles rising like embers or fireflies from the old system
Light volumetric haze catching the golden light
Atmosphere.Mood: Hopeful, dawning recognition, the quiet excitement of unlocking something that was always there

Situation.Name: Knowledge Rising
Situation.Setting: A workspace where old and new technology coexist. On one side, an aged server rack or legacy terminal — weathered, industrial, clearly old — but alive, humming, with warm light glowing from within. Rising from it, holographic knowledge structures are forming in the air: interconnected wiki-like pages, entity relationship diagrams, prose fragments, all linked by glowing threads. The structures are translucent, layered, and expanding — knowledge compiling itself from raw material. The room beyond is open, suggesting space and possibility.
Situation.Camera: Mid-shot, slightly low angle, showing her from the waist up with the legacy system to her right and the rising knowledge structures filling the space above and to the left. She's positioned at the boundary between the old system and the new knowledge it's producing.

CharacterPose.Expression: Slight smile of recognition. Eyes bright and engaged, looking up at the forming knowledge structures. Not awe — quiet confidence. She expected this would work, and it did.
CharacterPose.BodyPosition: Standing, upright, one hand resting on the aged server rack — physically connecting old and new. Weight centered, grounded.
CharacterPose.Gesture: Right hand resting on the legacy system's surface, left hand slightly raised with palm up as if receiving what's emerging. Not commanding it — welcoming it.

Character.Name: Dark blazer with pushed-up sleeves
Character.Description: Professional but ready to work, catching warm reflections from the rising structures
Character.Application: Worn, bridging the physical legacy system and the emerging knowledge

Article.Name: Legacy system terminal
Article.Description: An aged, weathered server rack or industrial terminal — dented metal, old indicator lights, clearly from a previous era. But it's alive: warm amber light glows from its seams and vents, and holographic structures are rising from its surface like heat shimmer made visible.
Article.Application: To her right, she's resting one hand on it. It's the raw/ directory — the uncompiled knowledge base.
Article.SymbolicMeaning: Every legacy codebase contains knowledge that has never been extracted — old systems are not just technical debt, they're unread libraries

Article.Name: Rising knowledge structures
Article.Description: Translucent holographic pages, entity diagrams, and interconnected prose fragments forming in layers above the legacy system. Some are wiki-like pages with visible headings. Others are relationship maps with glowing node connections. Threads link them back down to the old system. They're still forming — some edges are incomplete, some pages are partially rendered.
Article.Application: Rising and expanding from the legacy terminal into the open space above, filling the left side of the frame
Article.SymbolicMeaning: The extraction-synthesis-application cycle — raw knowledge compiling into structured understanding

Environment.Name: Open workspace beyond
Environment.Description: The space behind and above is open — high ceiling, ambient light, room to grow. Not a cramped server closet but a space that invites expansion.
Environment.Application: Background, suggesting that what's emerging has room to develop

Environment.Name: Warm particles
Environment.Description: Small golden motes rising from the legacy system, like embers or pollen or data made visible — the raw material in transit between old form and new
Environment.Application: Scattered throughout the space between the system and the knowledge structures

KeyDetails: The contrast between the old physical system and the emerging holographic knowledge is the core visual metaphor
Her hand on the old system is important — she's not discarding it, she's reading it
The knowledge structures should feel organic and alive, not sterile — they're growing, not manufactured
The warm amber palette conveys hope without being saccharine — this is professional optimism, not fantasy
The incomplete edges of some knowledge structures suggest that extraction is a process, not a finished product
Situation.LightingFocus: Warm golden light emanating from within the legacy system, casting amber glow on her face and hand. The rising knowledge structures add soft cyan and magenta highlights. The overall effect is sunrise — warmth emerging from something old and overlooked.

ArticleContext.Title: Every Codebase Is an Uncompiled Knowledge Base
